pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the compiler targets JDK 17, failing to utilize or comply with JDK 21 standards if enforced by CI or parent POMs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use explicit source/target versions and add annotation processors for Lombok, MapStruct, and their binding.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the mapstruct-processor and lombok-mapstruct-binding in annotationProcessorPaths, MapStruct mapper implementations will not be generated, causing compilation errors for missing classes.
